settings.fallback_description:
Daily Reign is the hormonal balance formula built from the ground up for Black women. Eight evidence-informed ingredients targeting the specific disparities documented by NIH and CDC research — from early perimenopause to iron deficiency and cycle irregularity.

Formulated with full doses on the label. No proprietary blends. No guesswork.

settings.title: Built for Black women's hormonal timeline
settings.body: Addresses the 8-year earlier perimenopause onset documented by SWAN/CDC research.

settings.title: Full doses. No blends. Total transparency.
settings.body: Every ingredient listed at its exact dose — no proprietary blend hiding what you're taking.

settings.title: Third-party tested
settings.body: Each batch verified for purity, potency, and label accuracy.

settings.title: 30-day guarantee
settings.body: If it's not right for you, we make it right. No hoops.

settings.heading: The data is not a talking point. It's a call to action.
settings.subheading: Published NIH and CDC research documenting what the healthcare system has long ignored.

settings.description: of Black women are Vitamin D deficient
earlier perimenopause onset in Black women on average
higher rate of iron deficiency anemia vs. non-Hispanic white women
Black women with PCOS face significant diagnostic delays

settings.eyebrow: Full formula — every ingredient, every reason
settings.heading: Not a generic formula. A targeted one.
settings.intro: Every ingredient in Daily Reign was chosen for a specific reason rooted in Black women's documented health disparities — not marketing trends.

settings.name: Black Cohosh
settings.benefit: Supports hormonal comfort and menopausal transition
settings.relevance: Black women experience perimenopause on average 8 years earlier — Black Cohosh addresses that earlier timeline directly. This isn't a product note. It's a documented disparity.

settings.name: Chasteberry (Vitex)
settings.benefit: Supports cycle regularity and hormonal balance
settings.relevance: PCOS and cycle irregularity disproportionately go undiagnosed in Black women. Vitex supports the cycle regulation they deserve and are rarely offered.

settings.name: Dong Quai
settings.benefit: Traditional menstrual health and comfort support
settings.relevance: Used for centuries across Asian and African healing traditions. Largely absent from mainstream US supplement lines despite a strong traditional record.

settings.name: Red Clover
settings.benefit: Phytoestrogen source for hormonal equilibrium support
settings.relevance: Rich in isoflavones that support the hormonal balance disrupted by early perimenopause — a condition Black women face statistically earlier than other groups.

settings.name: Sage Leaf
settings.benefit: Supports comfort during temperature regulation changes
settings.relevance: Hot flashes and night sweats begin earlier and present more severely in Black women. Sage Leaf targets these specific experiences at a meaningful dose.

settings.name: Wild Yam
settings.benefit: Natural precursor support for hormonal pathways
settings.relevance: A natural source of diosgenin — a precursor that supports the adrenal and reproductive hormonal pathways without synthetic intervention.

settings.name: Licorice Root
settings.relevance: Chronic stress directly disrupts hormonal health. Black women carry a disproportionate allostatic load. Licorice Root supports adrenal resilience.
settings.contraindication: Consult a healthcare provider if you have high blood pressure or take blood pressure medication. Black women have higher rates of hypertension — this interaction matters.

settings.name: Red Raspberry Leaf
settings.benefit: Menstrual comfort and pelvic wellness support
settings.relevance: A generational herb used across cultures for menstrual wellness, now formulated at a therapeutic dose that most generic products don't reach.

settings.heading: Get the research as it drops.
settings.subheading: Subscribe for the studies behind Daily Reign — and first access to new formulations.
settings.legal_note: By subscribing, you agree to receive email from For Her Throne.
